headline: 暑期档预热：新片扎堆引期待
headlineEn: Summer Movie Season Heats Up: New Films Spark Excitement
summary: 今日娱乐新闻聚焦暑期档，多部新片如《痴迷》《福尔摩斯小姐3》等成为热门话题，市场期待值攀升。
summaryEn: Today's entertainment news focuses on the summer season, with trending titles like 'Obsession' and 'Enola Holmes 3' driving high market anticipation.

industryHighlights.text: 《末日地堡》口碑发酵，讨论度激增
《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》定档消息引粉丝狂欢
industryHighlights.en: 'Spider-Man: Fresh Start' release date excites fans
